actions.value:
At this time, the ACH Bank Transfer method is temporarily unavailable. The supporting partner, Kado, has recently been acquired and their services were recently disabled. Fortunately, we found a replacement partner for ACH selling. We've finished coding it, so you'll be able to resume ACH orders within the next update (v4.27) about ~1 week away.

 

If waiting is not an option, please try using an alternative pay-out method on the Sell scene of the app to find an off-ramp partner that will suit your need.

 

We are here if you have any further questions.
